title: OOM Kill Takes Down API

payload.log_text:
May 13 03:01:20 ubuntu-prod kernel: Out of memory: Killed process 2817 (nginx) total-vm:824312kB, anon-rss:512000kB
May 13 03:01:21 ubuntu-prod systemd[1]: nginx.service: Main process exited, code=killed, status=9/KILL
May 13 03:01:22 ubuntu-prod nginx[2901]: connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream
May 13 03:01:24 ubuntu-prod app[3010]: POST /api/orders returned 503 upstream unavailable

chat_prompt: Find the root cause chain from memory pressure to API 503.
